name: soul-sdk
description: Professional TypeScript SDK for Zolvency Protocol on Stellar & EVM

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const mainPath = require.resolve('@stellar/stellar-sdk'); const targetStr = path.join('@stellar', 'stellar-sdk'); const idx = mainPath.lastIndexOf(targetStr); const sdkDir = mainPath.substring(0, idx + targetStr.length); ['lib', 'lib/minimal', 'lib/no-axios', 'lib/no-eventsource'].forEach(dir => { const target = path.join(sdkDir, dir, 'package.json'); if (fs.existsSync(path.join(sdkDir, dir))) { fs.copyFileSync(path.join(sdkDir, 'package.json'), target); } });"

author: Felipe Nunes
